programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: Next Goal Wins
programme.desc: With the 2014 World Cup fast approaching, Dutch football coach Thomas Rongen is hired to lead the famously pitiful national team of American Samoa. But despite the odds, can Rongen pave the way to the island’s first ever victory on the world stage?

programme.title: Queen Of The Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attaché for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT tips it's hat to the godfather of poker with the launch of the inaugural "Doyle Brunson North American Poker Championship" and a final table loaded with star power worthy of the master himself.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Surf's up as the World Poker Tour heads back to Aruba where fun in the sun means poker on the beach and one lucky player's vacation ends with a million dollar payday.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Six and a half million dollars. Even the world's largest casino is barely big enough to contain this final table as the enormous Foxwoods Resort and Casino becomes ground zero for one of the largest poker tournaments in history.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.
In a totalitarian future society, Winston Smith, whose daily work is re-writing history, tries to rebel by falling in love.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Over the Top
programme.desc: A Championship title, a huge cash award, and his son's love -- the greatest prize of all -- are at stake when Hawk battles his strongest enemy for everything he has ever wanted.

programme.title: The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Action legends Jackie Chan and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up in this high concept fantasy historical epic. Set in the 18th century, English traveller Jonathan Green travels from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king!

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: His faith broken by years of battle as a crusader, Behmam, a medieval knight, returns to central Europe to find his homeland decimated by the Black Plague.

programme.title: The Love of Her Life
programme.desc: Allison has no trouble finding a man, it's keeping them that's the problem. She meets Brian and swears things will be different, but they aren't. When he leaves her, Allison blames Brian's younger sister, and vows to get even by stealing away her son.

programme.title: Her Fatal Flaw
programme.desc: Starring Victoria Pratt. A state's attorney learns that the primary suspect in one of the most politically explosive cases in Chicago history has a rock-solid alibi: Their one-night stand.

programme.title: Saving Emily
programme.desc: When her daughter is diagnosed with leukemia, a woman (Alexandra Paul) and her new husband get pulled into the whirlwind life of her seedy ex-husband who tries to extort money from them in exchange for his life-saving bone marrow.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos when an alien invasion takes place. But the aliens have arrived for a very specific reason - to find the one boy out of 7 billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Meteor Apocalypse
programme.desc: In this End Times thriller, a gigantic meteor enters Earth's orbit and begins to disintegrate, showering the planet in poisonous debris.

programme.title: Drone DR1 (AKA Rotor DR1)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world where half the population is dead or missing and the sky is full of autonomous drones, a 16-year-old boy named Kitch sets out to find his father, joined by DR1, his drone companion.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A Perth heavy haulage crew moves a huge pedestrian bridge.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve battles flooded highways when his truck breaks down, leaving him stranded.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A leaky fridge halts Woody's urgent frozen food delivery.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A delicate rescue operation to recover a 70-year-old World War II bomber.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kelly must transport 40 tonnes of grapes to a winery before they start fermenting.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death In Inner Space
programme.desc: A scientist seeks a way to suspend bodily life functions during space travel, and his test subject dies from lack of oxygen. Accident or foul play?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Talking Head
programme.desc: A 12 year old boy insists his dead father told him to kill his mother's new fiancée. But did the father truly die in an accidental plane crash?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Devil Sells His Soul
programme.desc: Colonel March hypnotizes five people to solve the stabbing murder of Lord Telford, while he himself portrays the murder victim.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Murder Is Permanent
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a murder in a beauty salon; there are plenty of suspects and it's up to him to single out the murderer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silent Vow
programme.desc: A customer dies from poisoned wine dining at a café, and the waiter falls under suspicion because he was a former chemist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death and the Other Monkey
programme.desc: A cancer research scientist believes his test monkey was not only stolen, but also replaced. He is later found dead from gas; suicide or not?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Stolen Crime
programme.desc: A man demands to be arrested for murdering his wealthy wife whose death is attributed to natural causes. A valuable coin collection holds the answers.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silver Curtain
programme.desc: Behind the "silver curtain" spray from a fountain, a man is found dead with a knife in his back. Colonel March is called in to investigate.

programme.title: 2003 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Germany and Canada played at Colombus Crew Stadium, Colombus on Saturday, 20 Sept. 2003.

programme.title: Icons
programme.desc: From Lagos to the biggest stages in women's football, this is Asisat Oshoala's incredible story.

programme.title: HD Cutz
programme.desc: The old friend Antonio Rüdiger, before jetting off to France to meet a new customer.

programme.title: La Coupe De La Gloire: The Official Film of the 1998 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Host team France stuns the world by reaching the final and then beating Brazil in the 1998 World Cup.

programme.title: 2019 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: From July 7, 2019.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Hoping to stop a diabolical plot, the CIA implants the memories and skills of a dead agent (Ryan Reynolds) into the mind of a dangerous convict (Kevin Costner).

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: An unemployed writer rises to the top of the financial world after an experimental drug gives him extraordinary mental acuity.

programme.title: Looper
programme.desc: A mob hit man (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) comes to the chilling realization that his latest assignment is his older self (Bruce Willis), sent back in time by his bosses.

programme.title: The Crucible Cup
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Victorian Belfast: Alice reveals the history of Belfast, the UK's most Victorian city. She visits the shipyards that built the Titanic and gets locked up in the Crumlin Road gaol.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: Age of Bronze and Iron: Dr Alice Roberts discovers what Britain was like before the Romans as she examines fascinating finds from the Bronze and Iron Ages.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: Ice and Stone: Alice Roberts learns more about mankind's Stone Age ancestors, and travels to Jersey to meet a team hoping to shed new light on the Neanderthals.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: East: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams present more outstanding archaeology. In the east of Britain, sites include Must Farm, Colchester, Oakington, Lyminge and Silchester.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: West: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit the Dorset Country Museum, where they explore finds from archaeological digs across the west of Britain.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: North: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams visit the Neolithic Orkney World Heritage Site, where they explore finds from archaeological digs across the north of Britain.

programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie
programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: The family of cat hoarder Mary gets a nasty shock when they drop by to visit. Plus, experts help professional cleaner Annie deal with her surprising compulsion.

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers

programme.desc: While Nigel rehearses his keynote speech in a Seville hotel room, a girl nearly breaks his nose demanding something - it turns out she was after the water from the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Buddha's Bowl

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Headless Nun

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey kills disguised demons, but Tripitaka, thinking they were humans, banishes him. When the truth emerges, Tripitaka is endangered, regretting his mistrust of Monkey and disbelief in the demons’ existence.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims find a village cursed with drought by a water monster who demands boy sacrifices. With Monkey’s cloud useless, brave Pigsy volunteers to give his life to save the people.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey saves a widow, but Pigsy falls in love while she desires Tripitaka. Staying behind, Pigsy’s piggish ways surface. When Monkey returns, Tripitaka and Sandy are already in trouble with the Snake Demon.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey hunts bandits for Lord Li, but discovers they’re not what they seem. Meanwhile, at an inn owned by a wicked dog-woman, Tripitaka faces a dangerous surprise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Tripitaka dreams of a slain king whose throne was stolen by a Taoist imposter. With the prince’s help, the pilgrims set out to reveal the false king and restore the rightful ruler.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Mark identifies a detective (Ricardo Montalban) as the man at the scene of an abortionist's murder; guest Robert Alda.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside protects a caustic TV-talk-show host (Milton Berle) who airs his opinions.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A cop-turned-vagrant (Ralph Meeker) tips Ironside to check the probe of a drunken transient's murder; with Clu Gulager.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside insists on having concrete evidence against a woman (Anne Baxter) accused of killing her spouse.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Fleece Inn
programme.desc: This old pup in the heart of West Yorkshire is said to be one of the Most Haunted places in England.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 1
programme.desc: An old house in England’s West Midlands gives the Most Haunted team a night they will never forget.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House
programme.desc: This week Yvette Fielding takes her Most Haunted team to Coalville and a house that is surrounded by mystery. The team seem to disturb the rest of some of its long-term residence as they battle through a night of terror.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Keithley Bus Museum
programme.desc: Once an old foundry, this large old building houses vehicles from a bygone era that are said to still contain passengers whose destination has never ended.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Presteigne, Mid Wales and the famous Judges Lodgings, were courts were held, people imprisoned and Judges stayed, but it also holds many a secret.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gone in 20 Seconds
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get taken down by their fiercest opponent, CJ, but a twist of fate keeps the guys in the game. They uncover a Geiger counter and NASCAR impact wrenches, while their accountant delivers some shocking news.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro
programme.desc: Two fierce opponents best Ton and Allen at the auction, leaving the duo in the lurch with a "trash unit" and little chance of breaking even for the day. And Ton gets tazed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Religious Ghosts
programme.desc: Meet ghosts that support and clash with people’s religious beliefs.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): My Dad's Ghost Saved My Mom's Life
programme.desc: Meet two women who receive ghostly messages that save their mothers’ lives.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): When Parents Don’t Believe
programme.desc: Hear from people whose parents didn’t believe them when they saw ghosts as kids.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Ghostly Muses
programme.desc: Witness two ghostly encounters that inspire artistic insight and prowess.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Hounded To Hell
programme.desc: See how a year-long battle with a ghost pushes Brad to the edge of sanity.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Danger Detectors From The Great Beyond
programme.desc: See how Tasheen and Christine react when spirits warn them of imminent danger.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Ghosts Of The Murdered
programme.desc: See the disturbing and macabre ghosts of murder victims.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): The House That Tweedie Built And Never Left
programme.desc: Meet a couple in a century-old farmhouse still occupied by its original owner.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Refuge in Rosaries
programme.desc: See how people turn to religious symbols when faced with supernatural threats.

programme.title: Ghostly Encounters (Blue Ant Media): Ghosts That Banish Nightmares
programme.desc: See how two women’s lives turned around when ghosts made them promises.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hungry Ghosts
programme.desc: In Taiwan, an American family refuses to believe there are ghosts in their house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Lair
programme.desc: For years, the Cranmer family thought their historic Pittsburgh dream home was haunted by a harmless ghost. But, when the activity grows violent, they fight back with the only weapon they have, prayer; culminating with an exorcism of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Confessions
programme.desc: An unknown entity appears to find pleasure in terrifying 17-year-old Macy Sherman, her younger sister Kelsey and their mom Carrie. The family reaches out for help, praying that they can get rid of the spirit intent on staying in their home forever.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a missing woman is discovered by a deputy to be murdered in the backyard of her family home, investigators must learn whether the victim was killed by a mysterious driver seen lingering outside the house, or someone unexpected.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives have a brutal case on their hands when a beloved community member is killed and a part of his body is apparently taken as a souvenir by the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: An accidental death in upstate New York becomes a possible murder scene, and a wife and mother provides a crucial piece of evidence. Investigators confront the darkest side of humanity to discover an unspeakable truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Sean Vincent Gillis from Louisiana was arrested on suspicion of killing five women, but during police questioning, he ultimately confessed to the brutal murders of three more people.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, the police investigate and discover that she had rather an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Medical Mysteries
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: An adrenaline junkie and her unborn baby somehow survive when their parachute fails, and a firefighter is incinerated in his bed.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Power Of The Mind
programme.desc: Power of the Mind: A housewife has a strange and sudden vision that helps to solve a murder. A man remembers every single moment of his life.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Kelly Cochran
programme.desc: When Chris Regan started dating coworker Kelly Cochran, he knew she was married. But he had no idea of the wedding day pact she had made with husband Jason. Chris had become entangled in a love triangle that would see two people lose their lives.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SCIENCE AND MYSTERIES FOR 21. CENTURY
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at some of the mysteries of modern science including memory of water, reincarnation, the beginning of life, hypnosis, the secrets of Morphic fields, time travel, why we must sleep.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Zanzibar: Land of Giants
programme.desc: The Zanzibar Archipelago has been labeled the most exotic island chain in the world. Pristine sands and azure blue sea make it a much loved holiday destination. /The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. Each of the 7,000 islands are unique.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Unwelcome with his own natal group the Commandos, roving male Wilson goes off on a mission to meet the ladies.

programme.title: Wild Asia: In The Realm Of The Red Ape
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests are one of the oldest habitats on the face of our earth – older than many of the stars.

programme.title: Wild Spain: The Mediterranean South
programme.desc: Even in the southern Spain, highly popular with holidaymakers, there is much waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Wild Hungary - A Water Wonderland

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Fatal Liaison - The Strange Affair of Adolf and Eva

programme.title: The Ultimate History of the Messerschmitt

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): 20,000 Leaks Under the City
programme.desc: Krang is out to liquidate the Turtles by pumping water through the Earth's crust and into the sewer system. The super pump starts sucking up the entire ocean and soon the streets are covered with three feet of water.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Camera Bugged
programme.desc: The polarisoid, an alien tourist visiting Earth, causes all sorts of commotion with his camera which sucks everything it photos literally inside the camera, including City Hall.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Green with Jealousy
programme.desc: In order to steal nuclear energy from a submarine, Krang creates a love potion which induces lovesickness in all of the Turtles - except Donatello, who does not eat the potion-laced pizza.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield tries to help Vito save his pizza business, which is threatened by the inferior pies from Mama Meanie's Pizza.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A mother bluebird is locked in a neighbourhood garage, so who will care for her eggs? That's a job for 'mother hen' Garfield!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is found by the dogcatcher with no licence on his collar.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie falls in love with a shower brush, but Garfield gets jealous that Odie is not paying attention to him so he throws the brush into the recycling bin without Odie knowing it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Lasagne-loving pussycat Garfield adventures and explores the differences between good and bad, and right and wrong.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon accidentally orders a live Turkey instead of a cooked turkey for dinner with Liz. Garfield disguises himself as a turkey to get rid of the turkey.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie watch the news about a villain named Silent Jack, who robs houses while the owners are away.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal meets a cat called Agent X who claims to be a Secret Agent, but he is really a runaway cat trying to impress the crowd.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield becomes the victim of a case of mistaken identity when he dresses up as Catzilla for Halloween.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie get their bodies swapped by a Saturn alien.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Nermal's owner leaves town, Nermal stays with Garfield and fakes a leg injury. Garfield and Odie plan to get rid of him.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The theme of the latest challenge is war movies, and among other things contestants have to jump out of a plane. Then another team member is eliminated.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: Geoff tries to boost viewership with harsh segments and embarrassing clips of DJ and Gwen; Gwen's behaviour caused her to lose friends.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The remaining contestants take on a bank heist challenge. They must break team-mates Owen and LeShawna out of a bank vault, then build a getaway go-kart from junk.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: After her lawsuit, Courtney is back, and playing by her own rules. Today's genre is the period drama - and the period in question is the Stone Age.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: At an annual Pokémon trading festival, a young Trainer is looking for a good trade for his Wobbuffet. The Team Rocket trio are looking for opportunities as well, but both sets of Trainers get more than they bargain for!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: An unexpected Pokémon firefighting competition reunites our heroes with some old friends, the Squirtle Squad! But they are in desperate need of some leadership, so Ash and Squirtle rejoin the ranks.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When they stumble upon a preschool for Wooper and an emergency calls the teacher away, our heroes come to the rescue! But, as always, Team Rocket is around the corner and up to no good…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On the way to Goldenrod City, our heroes are forced to head through a tunnel guarded by angry Onix. To make it more difficult, Team Rocket, Snubbull, and Jigglypuff drop in for a visit…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Following a string of mysterious thefts, our heroes discover some Houndour struggling to survive in the wild. To help these thieving Pokémon mend their ways, Ash and friends will first have to earn their trust.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash and Misty’s rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile’s new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock’s Vulpix and Ash’s Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash’s Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill’s heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a hide & seek game, before watching a little boy with his stick insects. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky saw a big cloud, Po saw a small cloud and Dipsy and Laa-Laa see two medium size clouds.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance through Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number five.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, it's time for Tubby Toast, but there's no Tubby Toast for Laa‑Laa. She is very sad, so the other Tubbies share their extra toast with Laa-Laa. Some children learn about the number six.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po walks up to say ‘Eh-oh’, then marches off again. She joins the other Teletubbies to see two children watching a herd of elephants in a safari park.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa’s present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children who are on a drive around a Game Park in South Africa. A trolley appears in Teletubbyland. Po wanted Tinky Winky to pull her in the trolley, but Tinky Winky was feeling tired.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty snake.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A little boy’s daddy is a policeman, he shows us his uniform and badges. The Teletubbies are sitting at their table when they hear a funny noise.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message, which makes Po laugh. The Teletubbies watch Mark and Zoe decorate cake with butter icing, chocolate and strawberries.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.title: Queen Of The Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attaché for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: A man wakes up after the death of his girlfriend to find he has grown horns.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Six and a half million dollars. Even the world's largest casino is barely big enough to contain this final table as the enormous Foxwoods Resort and Casino becomes ground zero for one of the largest poker tournaments in history.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Sin City rings up a heavenly payout as Bellagio in Las Vegas hosts the final table of the five million dollar Five Diamond World Poker Classic.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Cinderella gets a tan as the WPT soaks up the fun in the Bahamas with a table full of reckless newcomers and a scorching $3,500,000 prize pool.
In a totalitarian future society, Winston Smith, whose daily work is re-writing history, tries to rebel by falling in love.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side
programme.desc: Those ghastly ghosts return to battle once more with JoBeth Williams and Craig T. Nelson for the soul of a young clairvoyant.

programme.title: Poltergeist III
programme.desc: In the climactic finale to the Poltergeist trilogy, those elusive demons are more frightening than ever as they follow Carol Anne to Chicago and inhabit an entire skyscraper.

programme.title: The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Action legends Jackie Chan and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up in this high concept fantasy historical epic. Set in the 18th century, English traveller Jonathan Green travels from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king!

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: His faith broken by years of battle as a crusader, Behmam, a medieval knight, returns to central Europe to find his homeland decimated by the Black Plague.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Saving Emily
programme.desc: When her daughter is diagnosed with leukemia, a woman (Alexandra Paul) and her new husband get pulled into the whirlwind life of her seedy ex-husband who tries to extort money from them in exchange for his life-saving bone marrow.

programme.title: Urge
programme.desc: A weekend getaway takes a dangerous turn when a mysterious nightclub owner introduces a group of friends to a new designer drug. Stripped of their inhibitions, they start living out their wildest fantasies.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: Sergio Leone's final film is the epic tale of the life of a Jewish gangster in New York.

programme.title: Drone DR1 (AKA Rotor DR1)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world where half the population is dead or missing and the sky is full of autonomous drones, a 16-year-old boy named Kitch sets out to find his father, joined by DR1, his drone companion.

programme.title: Space Truckers
programme.desc: A space trucker and his cute fiancee are on their way from a space station to Earth with an unknown cargo. When space pirates hijack them, 5000 disintegrator robots are found in the cargo.

programme.title: Futra Days
programme.desc: After undergoing an experimental time travel "process" that sends a man into his future, he investigates the man he has become, by engaging in a romance with his future self's girlfriend in a mind-bending reality.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kelly must transport 40 tonnes of grapes to a winery before they start fermenting.

programme.title: Jail: The Little Fighter
programme.desc: An aspiring martial-arts fighter tries to wriggle out of handcuffs.

programme.title: Jail: Occupied By Psoriasis
programme.desc: An intoxicated man claims to be connected to the Wall Street movement.

programme.title: Jail: Wigging Out
programme.desc: A couple is taken into custody for lewd and indecent exposure.

programme.title: Jail: Exercise With Caution
programme.desc: An uncooperative inmate complicates things.

programme.title: Jail: Pot For Poker
programme.desc: A drug peddler claims he's selling to support his addiction to poker.

programme.title: Jail: Control Your Emotions
programme.desc: A woman is arrested for allegedly stalking David Copperfield.

programme.title: Jail: Repeat Customer
programme.desc: A repeat offender tries to provoke officers into a physical confrontation.

programme.title: Jail: Bad Coffee

programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance. Detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Teenage Obsession

programme.desc: Murder of Jia Yann Chao – Chien Lee killed his friend Jia Yann Chao over an affair with Lee’s ex-wife. He tried to stage it as a drug deal gone wrong, but police saw through it. Lee confessed and was sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 043

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Ties
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Special Delivery
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surface Scratches
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Great Debate
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Facebooked
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But unfortunately they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mano-a-Mano
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Road Show: Where Mercy is Shown
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: O Little Town of West Monroe
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie's Number Two
programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: From Duck 'til Dawn
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Burger Commander
programme.desc: After visiting a popular burger restaurant, Willie and Jase get into a debate over which of them cooks the best burger, prompting them to challenge one another to a cooking contest.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: G.I. Si
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old G.I. Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jase and the Argonauts

programme.desc: A homeless boy wishes that someone would love him.

programme.desc: Discover doorways to wormholes in time, their secret locations around the world, as well as who is trying to open them and why.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Flying Saucer

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top Ten Secret Societies

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders

programme.desc: Evidence suggests that time travel may have occurred in the past.

programme.title: Dynasty: Virginia Reels

programme.title: Dynasty: House of the Falling Son
programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers. Seeing a little of Dex in Boyd.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Son Also Rises

programme.title: Dynasty: Grimes and Punishment
programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sins of the Fathers
programme.desc: Alexis is emotionally crushed by Dex's affair with Sable; Blake tells Dex and Sable beneath the lake is a Nazi treasure and his father killed Grimes to prevent him form exploiting it; Adam tries to win back Blake's trust so he can spy for Alexis.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Steven & Samm

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ashley & Mike
programme.desc: For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies? (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Keyonnah & Bow Wow

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Caroline

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Interrogator

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is the amazing story of how a two amateur explorers discovered one of the world's greatest civilisations, the Maya.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Ralegh Radford stares into an empty pit; has he found the final resting place of King Arthur, the wielder of Excalibur, the founder of Camelot and the Lord of the Round Table?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: For 70 years, treasure hunters have sought Rennes-le-Chateau's secret. In the 19th century, priest Berenger Sauniere became mysteriously wealthy. His confidante, Marie Denarnaud, hinted at the treasure but died before revealing it.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul

programme.title: Murder Maps: Terror In The Roaring Twenties
programme.desc: Edith Thompson and Frederick Bywaters were in love. But the young couple were convicted for murdering her husband in a case that shocked society and fascinated Alfred Hitchcoc

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Blackout Ripper

programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Breathless/The Fright Stuff
programme.desc: Will Buster's friends treat him the same after they learn he has asthma? Prankster have arrived in Elwood City--just in time for the "Scare Your Pants Off" costume party! It's boys vs. girls in what becomes a great big battle of the pranks.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Why We Fight
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: I Have Never Forgotten You
programme.desc: I Have Never Forgotten You provides an intimate portrait of famed Nazi hunter and humanitarian, Simon Wiesenthal. This rare biography looks closely at the sacrifices made by one of history's bravest and boldest.

programme.title: Battle for the Bulge
programme.desc: The Battle for the Bulge was the last major German offensive move on the Western Front during the Second World War.

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Race For Radar
programme.desc: On the brink of war the Germans mount a daring Zeppelin spy mission. Had the Luftwaffe spies discovered Britain’s greatest secret?'

programme.title: The Real Hunt for Red October: Part 1
programme.desc: Film lifting the lid on the secret events surrounding the Russian submarine, Red October, that went missing in 1968, and which brought the Soviet Union and US to the brink of war.

programme.title: Shadow Man
programme.desc: The dramatic true story of the most elaborate espionage operation ever mounted by one country against an ally, as Winston Churchill launches a plan to undermine pro-Nazi sympathisers.

programme.title: Hitler & Churchill: The Eagle & The Lion
programme.desc: The Old Lion vs. the German Eagle. This clash of titans waged at the highest level of power dominated the last century. And leads us to posit a chilling contingency to history: what would Europe be now had the players been different?

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The Mastermind
programme.desc: When WW2 breaks out, an elite force of German U-boat commanders attempt to starve Britain into submission. Vera Mathews heads the reformed WRENS. Meanwhile retired naval commander Gilbert Roberts is desperate to return to his career.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Syria
programme.desc: Syria: Since the Syrian civil war broke out in 2011, 400,000 have been killed in the conflict. Who is to blame for this and the terrible conditions in which its people live?

programme.title: Guardians Of The Wild

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids take off an incredible journey across the Moonlands, as they team-up with Chur... who was stripped of his Shadow Magi powers by Gorgram. Now, the Final Dreamers must use the ancient magical obelisks in each realm to charge a powerful relic.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Korg's theft of a scroll from Naroom's library sends our heroes in pursuit of the Shadow Magi to the forbidding desert realm of the Sands of D’Resh. They ride aboard a Quanjuel – a horse-like creature that can travel through magical vortexes.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony's haunted dreams about his Grandpa lead the final dreamers to Orothe, where they find a surly, mean-tempered Spencer. But the kids are distracted by an unknown Shadow Magi, Mercenair, who is attacking the realm's powerful coral reef.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Truth and Consequences
programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi, Come Home
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension, Usagi Yojimbo, into an ally of his and an enemy of the Turtles.
